{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = The Lodge
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Lodge]] is [[Benri Vallenar]]'s favorite meeting-room on his starship.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c25">''The Captain'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic]] has a Lodge.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c27">''The Captain'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
